title: Nightmare
global_negative: photorealistic, 3d render, western comic style, extra limbs, deformed hands, fused fingers, blurry, watermark, logo, text overlay, speech bubble, readable text, letters, numbers, low quality, chibi, equal size panel grid, uniform strip of identical boxes, more than 3 panel rows per page, crowded warmup floor, everyone in matching tracksuits, awkward raised paddles, paddle extended toward coach, floating characters, sitting poses, mid-air poses, stretched limo van, double front doors, wrong ring mat layout, oval ring, circular ring, all blue hogus in same ring, red center mat with blue border, Ethan jet black hair, Ethan pure black hair, Ethan brown black hair, Ethan hair with no blue tint

pages.label: PAGE 0 — Voices in the dark (prelude)
pages.prompt: 1536x1024 pure black background floating white italic uppercase glowing text no bubble borders staggered layout nightmare voices prelude. EXACT text: I FEEL BAD FOR ETHAN. / YOU WANT HIM TO BE GOOD AT SCHOOL AND TAEKWONDO? / I DON'T THINK HE HAS THE TEMPERAMENT TO COMPETE AS A WORLD CLASS BLACK BELT. / YOU SKIPPED THESE TOURNAMENTS. / I DON'T KNOW HOW COMMITTED YOU ARE FOR TAEKWONDO. / YOU ARE EITHER WITH US... / ...OR AGAINST US. larger bottom center.
